phase: GAP-5 passive outcome — controller instance v1 closed
outcome_statement: H5 controller instance v1 is inactive under the preregistered operationalization. The inactivity is not caused by implementation errors. It is caused by the mismatch between the temporal support of the mechanistic burst (~0.4 s) and the operational signal (EWMA tau=1 s).
outcome_statement_es: v1 no se activa porque la operacionalizacion de Gamma_bar no preserva el fenomeno observado offline.

gap5_poc.config_regime_note: Gamma offline ~150x lower than F1; mechanistic regime not visible in this filter config

central_finding: Gamma is not a good real-time control variable in the form defined for v1. The issue is operationalization (offline diagnostic vs online control signal), not threshold miscalibration.
gap5_v2_hypothesis: H6-OBS: exists an internal EKF property whose observation identifies preregistered regime changes with stable meaning under C-F1 and C-PoC (property selection, not observable ranking)
gap5_v2_selection_criterion: interpretability x invariance x locality (not earliest burst detection)
